items.title: Wright said the Spurs have a "great group."
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Wright said the Spurs have a "great group."

"We've got a lot of that group coming back and so we'll continue to do our due diligence, but we believe in the team we had. We believe we were there (in the Finals) for a reason."

He also heaped praise on the Knicks saying they "earned" their title.

items.title: Brian Wright said he thought Mitch Johnson and his staff "did an amazing...phenomenal job."
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Brian Wright said he thought Mitch Johnson and his staff "did an amazing...phenomenal job."

He added that everyone in the organization can find moments in the season "where we can all get better, and that's a beautiful thing."

items.title: Today I stepped off a flight from Europe and barely had time to get my thoughts together before heading over to the Jazz facility for draft night. I barely know what my name is, much less what day it is. I just hope what I wrote was moderately coherent.
items.author: Sarah Todd
items.body_excerpt: Today I stepped off a flight from Europe and barely had time to get my thoughts together before heading over to the Jazz facility for draft night. I barely know what my name is, much less what day it is. I just hope what I wrote was moderately coherent.

items.title: On Saturday, the Jazz brass went to Darryn Peterson’s hometown of Canton, Ohio. They spent time with him and his family, sold him on the Jazz and solidified the decision that he was their guy.

items.title: Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.

"Guys were in the paint, hacking, bruising, all that. I got the body for it and I embrace the physical game.That's a huge part of who I am and how I play."

items.title: To be clear, my verdict on the Nuggets trading down is still "incomplete", pending further moves that make it make much more sense.
items.author: Joel Rush
items.body_excerpt:
To be clear, my verdict on the Nuggets trading down is still "incomplete", pending further moves that make it make much more sense.

But those moves will be absolutely necessary, and if they don't flip this into something positive, it's tentatively looking like an F-minus.

But we'll see.

items.title: Nick Nurse, asked about the league getting longer, pointed out that it is also getting faster, and calls it a positive for the Sixers.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse, asked about the league getting longer, pointed out that it is also getting faster, and calls it a positive for the Sixers.

"Can we get our asses back and guard 'em? Can we keep up and keep them off the glass? We need to be able to do both of those things."

items.title: Asked Nick Nurse for a scouting report of a player he coached in one Summer League by the name of Mike Gansey:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Nick Nurse for a scouting report of a player he coached in one Summer League by the name of Mike Gansey:

"You could probably guess it: good shooter, played hard. If there was a hustle award, he would have won it."
